query:
SELECT rp.id AS prospect_id, rp.firstName, rp.lastName, rp.email, rp.createdAt
FROM recruitment_prospects rp
WHERE rp.pipelineStage = 'new_enquiry'
  AND rp.applicationSubmittedAt IS NULL
  AND (
    LOWER(rp.email) IN (SELECT LOWER(personalEmail) FROM agent_crm_profiles WHERE personalEmail IS NOT NULL)
    OR
    LOWER(rp.email) IN (SELECT LOWER(jltEmail) FROM agent_crm_profiles WHERE jltEmail IS NOT NULL)
  )
ORDER BY rp.createdAt DESC;

    OR

  )
ORDER BY rp.createdAt DESC;
